name: audit-log
description: Append-only workspace audit trail. audit.record inserts one bounded, immutable row; the highest-value hooks db.insert directly inside the acting mutation (member role change/remove, leave, invite accept, shared-credential delete) so the audit row commits in the SAME transaction — no action hop. Admin-only AuditLogCard lists recent events with actor + action + time + action-prefix filter pills; a daily cron prunes rows >90 days.
notes: Consumer must add: the auditEvents table (schemaImports/spreads), the prune-audit cron line, an 'Audit' nav entry (the card self-gates to admin+ and hides on personal workspaces), and the sharedEdits wiring audit rows into member/invite/credential mutations. Append-only — rows are never patched, only pruned by the 90-day cron. Credential-delete hook fires ONLY for workspace-shared creds (personal-cred deletes are not workspace events and have no workspaceId to attribute). NOTE: cred.deleted is wired but currently LATENT — no shared-credential WRITE path exists yet (store() sets no workspaceId), so no shared cred can exist to delete; the hook activates automatically once shared-cred write ships.
